
```{r}
library(data.table)
data1<- fread('Yangfansupp79151.raw.tab')
```

```{r}
shap_test=read.csv("E:/UKB/data/wxx-lung cancer/shap_test_lung.csv")
shap_train=read.csv("E:/UKB/data/wxx-lung cancer/shap_train_lung.csv")

```

```{r}
train=cbind(shap_train,train)
test=cbind(shap_test,test)
```


```{r}
train$IPAQ=ifelse(is.na(train$IPAQ),99,train$IPAQ)
test$IPAQ=ifelse(is.na(test$IPAQ),99,test$IPAQ)
train$BMI=ifelse(is.na(train$BMI),mean(train$BMI,na.rm = TRUE),train$BMI)
test$BMI=ifelse(is.na(test$BMI),mean(test$BMI,na.rm = TRUE),test$BMI)
train$townsend =ifelse(is.na(train$townsend ),mean(train$townsend ,na.rm = TRUE),train$townsend )
test$townsend =ifelse(is.na(test$townsend ),mean(test$townsend ,na.rm = TRUE),test$townsend )
```

```{r}
data=rbind(train,test)
data2=data
train2=train
test2=test
data=data[,c(1:3,2916:2931)]
train=train[,c(1:3,2916:2931)]
test=test[,c(1:3,2916:2931)]
```



```{r}
train=merge(train,df_genotype,by="f.eid")
test=merge(test,df_genotype,by="f.eid")
data=merge(data,df_genotype,by="f.eid")
data=data[-which(data$smoking_status==99),]
train=train[-which(train$smoking_status==99),]
test=test[-which(test$smoking_status==99),]
```
                                                         
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(Hmisc)
library(finalfit)
library(flextable)
```

```{r}
data$alcohol_freq=factor(data$alcohol_freq)
data$Lung_Cancer=factor(data$Lung_Cancer)
data$smoking_status=factor(data$smoking_status)
data$education=factor(data$education)
data$family_cancer=factor(data$family_cancer)
data$IPAQ=factor(data$IPAQ)
data$time=as.numeric(data$time)
dependent="Lung_Cancer"
name1=names(data)
independent=name1[-c(1,2,3,4,6,10)]
t=data%>%summary_factorlist(dependent,independent,p=TRUE,p_cat = "chisq",p_cont_para="t.test")
t %>%
    regulartable() %>%
    autofit()
```

#PRS分层
```{r}
datax=data[-which(data$Lung_Cancer==1),]
quantiles <- quantile(datax$LC_prs, probs = seq(0, 1, by = 0.25))

# 按照10分位数进行划分
data$category <- cut(data$LC_prs, breaks = quantiles, include.lowest = TRUE)
data$category <- as.numeric(data$category)
```

```{r}
data$PRS=ifelse(data$category==1 | data$category==4,data$category,2)
```


```{r}
train=merge(train,data[,c(1,22)],by="f.eid")
test=merge(test,data[,c(1,22)],by="f.eid")
```

# Low-PRS
```{r}
data_lowPRS=data[which(data$PRS==1),]
train_lowPRS=train[which(train$PRS==1),]
test_lowPRS=test[which(test$PRS==1),]
data_lowPRS=na.omit(data_lowPRS)
train_lowPRS=na.omit(train_lowPRS)
test_lowPRS=na.omit(test_lowPRS)
library(survival)
model1=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~X0,data=train_lowPRS)
summary(model1)
model2=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~age+sex+factor(smoking_status)+education+townsend+BMI+factor(family_cancer)+factor(IPAQ),data=train_lowPRS)
summary(model2)
model3=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~X0+age+sex+factor(smoking_status)+education+townsend+BMI+factor(family_cancer)+factor(IPAQ),data=train_lowPRS)
summary(model3)
```

```{r}
library(pROC)
roc_model_PRORS=roc(test_lowPRS$Lung_Cancer,predict(model1,test_lowPRS))
roc_model_PRORS
ci.auc(roc_model_PRORS)

roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC=roc(test_lowPRS$Lung_Cancer,predict(model2,test_lowPRS))
roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC
ci.auc(roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC)

roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC=roc(test_lowPRS$Lung_Cancer,predict(model3,test_lowPRS))
roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC
ci.auc(roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC)
```

```{r}
roc.test(roc_model_PRORS,roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC,method="bootstrap")
roc.test(roc_model_PRORS,roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC,method="bootstrap")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
ggroc(list(roc_model_PRORS,roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC,roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC))+ theme_minimal() + geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", alpha=0.7, color = "grey") + coord_equal()+labs(color="C-statistics (95%CI)") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#0072B5FF", "#458B00", "#E18727FF"),
                     labels = c("ProRS: 0.856 (0.780-0.931)","Demographic: 0.776 (0.685-0.868)","Combined: 0.864 (0.791-0.938)")) + theme(legend.position = c(0.75, 0.2))
ggsave(
  "ROC_lowPRS.png",
  width = 6,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 600
)
```


#Medium-PRS
```{r}
data_mediumPRS=data[which(data$PRS==2),]
train_mediumPRS=train[which(train$PRS==2),]
test_mediumPRS=test[which(test$PRS==2),]
data_mediumPRS=na.omit(data_mediumPRS)
train_mediumPRS=na.omit(train_mediumPRS)
test_mediumPRS=na.omit(test_mediumPRS)
library(survival)
model1=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~X0,data=train_mediumPRS)
summary(model1)
model2=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~age+sex+factor(smoking_status)+education+townsend+BMI+factor(family_cancer)+factor(IPAQ),data=train_mediumPRS)
summary(model2)
model3=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~X0+age+sex+factor(smoking_status)+education+townsend+BMI+factor(family_cancer)+factor(IPAQ),data=train_mediumPRS)
summary(model3)
```


```{r}
library(pROC)
roc_model_PRORS=roc(test_mediumPRS$Lung_Cancer,predict(model1,test_mediumPRS,type="risk"))
roc_model_PRORS
ci.auc(roc_model_PRORS)

roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC=roc(test_mediumPRS$Lung_Cancer,predict(model2,test_mediumPRS))
roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC
ci.auc(roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC)

roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC=roc(test_mediumPRS$Lung_Cancer,predict(model3,test_mediumPRS,type="risk"))
roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC
ci.auc(roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC)
```

```{r}
roc.test(roc_model_PRORS,roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC,method="bootstrap")
roc.test(roc_model_PRORS,roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC,method="bootstrap")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
ggroc(list(roc_model_PRORS,roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC,roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC))+ theme_minimal() + geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", alpha=0.7, color = "grey") + coord_equal()+labs(color="C-statistics (95%CI)") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#0072B5FF", "#458B00", "#E18727FF"),
                     labels = c("ProRS: 0.785 (0.726-0.844)","Demographic: 0.794 (0.739-0.849)","Combined: 0.804 (0.748-0.859)")) + theme(legend.position = c(0.75, 0.2))
ggsave(
  "ROC_mediumPRS.png",
  width = 6,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 600
)
```

#High-PRS
```{r}
data_highPRS=data[which(data$PRS==4),]
train_highPRS=train[which(train$PRS==4),]
test_highPRS=test[which(test$PRS==4),]
data_highPRS=na.omit(data_lowPRS)
train_highPRS=na.omit(train_highPRS)
test_highPRS=na.omit(test_highPRS)
library(survival)
model1=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~X0,data=train_highPRS)
summary(model1)
model2=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~age+sex+factor(smoking_status)+education+townsend+BMI+factor(family_cancer)+factor(IPAQ),data=train_highPRS)
summary(model2)
model3=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~X0+age+sex+factor(smoking_status)+education+townsend+BMI+factor(family_cancer)+factor(IPAQ),data=train_highPRS)
summary(model3)
```


```{r}
library(pROC)
roc_model_PRORS=roc(test_highPRS$Lung_Cancer,predict(model1,test_highPRS,type="risk"))
roc_model_PRORS
ci.auc(roc_model_PRORS)

roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC=roc(test_highPRS$Lung_Cancer,predict(model2,test_highPRS,type="risk"))
roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC
ci.auc(roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC)

roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC=roc(test_highPRS$Lung_Cancer,predict(model3,test_highPRS,type="risk"))
roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC
ci.auc(roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC)
```

```{r}
roc.test(roc_model_PRORS,roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC,method="bootstrap")
roc.test(roc_model_PRORS,roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC,method="bootstrap")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
ggroc(list(roc_model_PRORS,roc_model_DEMOGRAPHIC,roc_model_test_PRORS_DEMOGRAPHIC))+ theme_minimal() + geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", alpha=0.7, color = "grey") + coord_equal()+labs(color="C-statistics (95%CI)") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#0072B5FF", "#458B00", "#E18727FF"),
                     labels = c("ProRS: 0.807 (0.742-0.871)","Demographic: 0.779 (0.712-0.839)","Combined: 0.799 (0.734-0.864)")) + theme(legend.position = c(0.75, 0.2))
ggsave(
  "ROC_highPRS.png",
  width = 6,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 600
)
```

#HR+Calibration
```{r}
library(survival)
library(riskRegression)

train_lowPRS <- na.omit(train[train$PRS==1, ])
test_lowPRS  <- na.omit(test[test$PRS==1, ])

train_lowPRS$time <- as.numeric(train_lowPRS$time)
test_lowPRS$time  <- as.numeric(test_lowPRS$time)

# train 拟合三模型
m1_low <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ X0, data=train_lowPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

m2_low <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ age + sex + factor(smoking_status) + education +
                  townsend + BMI + factor(family_cancer) + factor(IPAQ),
                data=train_lowPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

m3_low <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ X0 + age + sex + factor(smoking_status) + education +
                  townsend + BMI + factor(family_cancer) + factor(IPAQ),
                data=train_lowPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

test_lowPRS$score_prors <- predict(m1_low, newdata=test_lowPRS, type="lp")
test_lowPRS$score_demo  <- predict(m2_low, newdata=test_lowPRS, type="lp")
test_lowPRS$score_comb  <- predict(m3_low, newdata=test_lowPRS, type="lp")
```

```{r}
# --- train HR ---
train_lowPRS$score_prors <- predict(m1_low, newdata=train_lowPRS, type="lp")
train_lowPRS$score_demo  <- predict(m2_low, newdata=train_lowPRS, type="lp")
train_lowPRS$score_comb  <- predict(m3_low, newdata=train_lowPRS, type="lp")

cox_hr_prors_low_train <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ scale(score_prors), data=train_lowPRS)
cox_hr_demo_low_train  <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ scale(score_demo),  data=train_lowPRS)
cox_hr_comb_low_train  <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ scale(score_comb),  data=train_lowPRS)

summary(cox_hr_prors_low_train)
summary(cox_hr_demo_low_train)
summary(cox_hr_comb_low_train)

# --- test HR ---
cox_hr_prors_low_test <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ scale(score_prors), data=test_lowPRS)
cox_hr_demo_low_test  <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ scale(score_demo),  data=test_lowPRS)
cox_hr_comb_low_test  <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ scale(score_comb),  data=test_lowPRS)

summary(cox_hr_prors_low_test)
summary(cox_hr_demo_low_test)
summary(cox_hr_comb_low_test)
```

```{r}
# 用 offset(score) 构造三个 Cox（只在 test）
cal_m1_low <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_prors,
                    data=test_lowPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)
cal_m2_low <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_demo,
                    data=test_lowPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)
cal_m3_low <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_comb,
                    data=test_lowPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

cox_score_low <- Score(
  list("ProRS"=cal_m1_low, "Demographic"=cal_m2_low, "Combined"=cal_m3_low),
  formula=Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ 1,
  data=test_lowPRS,
  conf.int=FALSE,
  times=c(1,15),
  plots=c("calibration"),
  metrics=c("auc","brier")
)

png("calibration_lowPRS.png", width=6, height=6, units="in", res=600)
plotCalibration(
  cox_score_low,
  time=15,  # ✅ 明确画15年，避免你看到的warning
  method="quantile", cens.method="local",
  xlim=c(0,0.1), ylim=c(0,0.1),
  auc.in.legend=TRUE, brier.in.legend=TRUE, legend=TRUE,
  lty=c(1,2,4,3), type="l",
  xlab="Predicted Risk", ylab="Observed Risk",
  col=c("#0072B5FF","#458B00","#E18727FF")
)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
train_mediumPRS <- na.omit(train[train$PRS==2, ])
test_mediumPRS  <- na.omit(test[test$PRS==2, ])

train_mediumPRS$time <- as.numeric(train_mediumPRS$time)
test_mediumPRS$time  <- as.numeric(test_mediumPRS$time)

m1_med <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ X0, data=train_mediumPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

m2_med <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ age + sex + factor(smoking_status) + education +
                  townsend + BMI + factor(family_cancer) + factor(IPAQ),
                data=train_mediumPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

m3_med <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ X0 + age + sex + factor(smoking_status) + education +
                  townsend + BMI + factor(family_cancer) + factor(IPAQ),
                data=train_mediumPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

# test 三分数
test_mediumPRS$score_prors <- predict(m1_med, newdata=test_mediumPRS, type="lp")
test_mediumPRS$score_demo  <- predict(m2_med, newdata=test_mediumPRS, type="lp")
test_mediumPRS$score_comb  <- predict(m3_med, newdata=test_mediumPRS, type="lp")

# HR（test）
summary(coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ scale(score_prors), data=test_mediumPRS))
summary(coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ scale(score_demo),  data=test_mediumPRS))
summary(coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ scale(score_comb),  data=test_mediumPRS))

# Calibration（test）
cal_m1_med <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_prors, data=test_mediumPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)
cal_m2_med <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_demo,  data=test_mediumPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)
cal_m3_med <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_comb,  data=test_mediumPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

cox_score_med <- Score(
  list("ProRS"=cal_m1_med, "Demographic"=cal_m2_med, "Combined"=cal_m3_med),
  formula=Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ 1,
  data=test_mediumPRS,
  conf.int=FALSE,
  times=c(1,15),
  plots=c("calibration"),
  metrics=c("auc","brier")
)

png("calibration_mediumPRS.png", width=6, height=6, units="in", res=600)
plotCalibration(
  cox_score_med,
  time=15,
  method="quantile", cens.method="local",
  xlim=c(0,0.1), ylim=c(0,0.1),
  auc.in.legend=TRUE, brier.in.legend=TRUE, legend=TRUE,
  lty=c(1,2,4,3), type="l",
  xlab="Predicted Risk", ylab="Observed Risk",
  col=c("#0072B5FF","#458B00","#E18727FF")
)
dev.off()
```

```{r}
train_highPRS <- na.omit(train[train$PRS==4, ])
test_highPRS  <- na.omit(test[test$PRS==4, ])

train_highPRS$time <- as.numeric(train_highPRS$time)
test_highPRS$time  <- as.numeric(test_highPRS$time)

m1_high <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ X0, data=train_highPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

m2_high <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ age + sex + factor(smoking_status) + education +
                   townsend + BMI + factor(family_cancer) + factor(IPAQ),
                 data=train_highPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

m3_high <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ X0 + age + sex + factor(smoking_status) + education +
                   townsend + BMI + factor(family_cancer) + factor(IPAQ),
                 data=train_highPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

# test 三分数
test_highPRS$score_prors <- predict(m1_high, newdata=test_highPRS, type="lp")
test_highPRS$score_demo  <- predict(m2_high, newdata=test_highPRS, type="lp")
test_highPRS$score_comb  <- predict(m3_high, newdata=test_highPRS, type="lp")

# HR（test）
summary(coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ scale(score_prors), data=test_highPRS))
summary(coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ scale(score_demo),  data=test_highPRS))
summary(coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ scale(score_comb),  data=test_highPRS))

# Calibration（test）
cal_m1_high <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_prors, data=test_highPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)
cal_m2_high <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_demo,  data=test_highPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)
cal_m3_high <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_comb,  data=test_highPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

cox_score_high <- Score(
  list("ProRS"=cal_m1_high, "Demographic"=cal_m2_high, "Combined"=cal_m3_high),
  formula=Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ 1,
  data=test_highPRS,
  conf.int=FALSE,
  times=c(1,15),
  plots=c("calibration"),
  metrics=c("auc","brier")
)

png("calibration_highPRS.png", width=6, height=6, units="in", res=600)
plotCalibration(
  cox_score_high,
  time=15,
  method="quantile", cens.method="local",
  xlim=c(0,0.1), ylim=c(0,0.1),
  auc.in.legend=TRUE, brier.in.legend=TRUE, legend=TRUE,
  lty=c(1,2,4,3), type="l",
  xlab="Predicted Risk", ylab="Observed Risk",
  col=c("#0072B5FF","#458B00","#E18727FF")
)
dev.off()
```

#DCA
```{r}
library(ggDCA)
library(ggplot2)

# 用 offset(score) 固定风险分数
dca_m1_low <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_prors,
                    data=test_lowPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

dca_m2_low <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_demo,
                    data=test_lowPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

dca_m3_low <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_comb,
                    data=test_lowPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

# DCA
d_low <- dca(dca_m1_low, dca_m2_low, dca_m3_low)

ggplot(d_low) +
  ylim(-0.01, 0.02)

ggsave(
  "DCA_lowPRS.png",
  width = 6,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
dca_m1_med <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_prors,
                    data=test_mediumPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

dca_m2_med <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_demo,
                    data=test_mediumPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

dca_m3_med <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_comb,
                    data=test_mediumPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

d_med <- dca(dca_m1_med, dca_m2_med, dca_m3_med)

ggplot(d_med) +
  ylim(-0.01, 0.02)

ggsave(
  "DCA_mediumPRS.png",
  width = 6,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
dca_m1_high <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_prors,
                     data=test_highPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

dca_m2_high <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_demo,
                     data=test_highPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

dca_m3_high <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ score_comb,
                     data=test_highPRS, x=TRUE, y=TRUE)

d_high <- dca(dca_m1_high, dca_m2_high, dca_m3_high)

ggplot(d_high) +
  ylim(-0.01, 0.02)

ggsave(
  "DCA_highPRS.png",
  width = 6,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 600
)
```

#KM Curve
```{r}
library(survival)
library(survminer)

# 用“非肺癌人群（Lung_Cancer==0）”的分位数切三组
make_group_by_controls <- function(df, score_var){
  ctrl <- df$Lung_Cancer == 0

  q25 <- as.numeric(quantile(df[[score_var]][ctrl], probs = 0.25, na.rm = TRUE, type = 7))
  q75 <- as.numeric(quantile(df[[score_var]][ctrl], probs = 0.75, na.rm = TRUE, type = 7))

  grp <- cut(df[[score_var]],
             breaks = c(-Inf, q25, q75, Inf),
             labels = c("Bottom 25%", "25% - 75%", "Top 25%"),
             include.lowest = TRUE, right = TRUE)

  list(grp = grp, q25 = q25, q75 = q75)
}
```

```{r}
# ====== 1.1 数据：整体 low 组（train+test）======
train_lowPRS <- na.omit(train[train$PRS==1, ])
test_lowPRS  <- na.omit(test[test$PRS==1, ])

train_lowPRS$time <- as.numeric(train_lowPRS$time)
test_lowPRS$time  <- as.numeric(test_lowPRS$time)

# ====== 1.2 分数：分别在 train/test 上算，再 rbind（最稳，不会炸）======
train_lowPRS$score_prors <- predict(m1_low, newdata=train_lowPRS, type="lp")
train_lowPRS$score_demo  <- predict(m2_low, newdata=train_lowPRS, type="lp")
train_lowPRS$score_comb  <- predict(m3_low, newdata=train_lowPRS, type="lp")

test_lowPRS$score_prors <- predict(m1_low, newdata=test_lowPRS, type="lp")
test_lowPRS$score_demo  <- predict(m2_low, newdata=test_lowPRS, type="lp")
test_lowPRS$score_comb  <- predict(m3_low, newdata=test_lowPRS, type="lp")

data_lowPRS <- rbind(train_lowPRS, test_lowPRS)

# ====== 1.3 ProRS：controls 分位数切组 + KM（累计发生率）======
tmp <- make_group_by_controls(data_lowPRS, "score_prors")
data_lowPRS$ProRS_grp <- tmp$grp

fit_low_prors <- survfit(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ ProRS_grp, data=data_lowPRS)

p_low_prors <- ggsurvplot(
  fit_low_prors, data=data_lowPRS,
  fun="event",                 # ✅ 累计发生风险
  risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
  legend.title="ProRS",
  legend.labs=c("Bottom 25%","25% - 75%","Top 25%"),
  xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence",
  ggtheme=theme_bw()
)
ggsave("KM_lowPRS_ProRS.png", p_low_prors$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

# ====== 1.4 Demographic：切组 + KM ======
tmp <- make_group_by_controls(data_lowPRS, "score_demo")
data_lowPRS$Demo_grp <- tmp$grp

fit_low_demo <- survfit(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ Demo_grp, data=data_lowPRS)

p_low_demo <- ggsurvplot(
  fit_low_demo, data=data_lowPRS,
  fun="event",
  risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
  legend.title="Demographic",
  legend.labs=c("Bottom 25%","25% - 75%","Top 25%"),
  xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence",
  ggtheme=theme_bw()
)
ggsave("KM_lowPRS_Demographic.png", p_low_demo$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

# ====== 1.5 Combined：切组 + KM ======
tmp <- make_group_by_controls(data_lowPRS, "score_comb")
data_lowPRS$Comb_grp <- tmp$grp

fit_low_comb <- survfit(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ Comb_grp, data=data_lowPRS)

p_low_comb <- ggsurvplot(
  fit_low_comb, data=data_lowPRS,
  fun="event",
  risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
  legend.title="Combined",
  legend.labs=c("Bottom 25%","25% - 75%","Top 25%"),
  xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence",
  ggtheme=theme_bw()
)
ggsave("KM_lowPRS_Combined.png", p_low_comb$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)
```

```{r}
train_mediumPRS <- na.omit(train[train$PRS==2, ])
test_mediumPRS  <- na.omit(test[test$PRS==2, ])

train_mediumPRS$time <- as.numeric(train_mediumPRS$time)
test_mediumPRS$time  <- as.numeric(test_mediumPRS$time)

train_mediumPRS$score_prors <- predict(m1_med, newdata=train_mediumPRS, type="lp")
train_mediumPRS$score_demo  <- predict(m2_med, newdata=train_mediumPRS, type="lp")
train_mediumPRS$score_comb  <- predict(m3_med, newdata=train_mediumPRS, type="lp")

test_mediumPRS$score_prors <- predict(m1_med, newdata=test_mediumPRS, type="lp")
test_mediumPRS$score_demo  <- predict(m2_med, newdata=test_mediumPRS, type="lp")
test_mediumPRS$score_comb  <- predict(m3_med, newdata=test_mediumPRS, type="lp")

data_mediumPRS <- rbind(train_mediumPRS, test_mediumPRS)

# ProRS
tmp <- make_group_by_controls(data_mediumPRS, "score_prors")
data_mediumPRS$ProRS_grp <- tmp$grp
fit_med_prors <- survfit(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ ProRS_grp, data=data_mediumPRS)
p_med_prors <- ggsurvplot(fit_med_prors, data=data_mediumPRS, fun="event",
                          risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                          legend.title="ProRS",
                          legend.labs=c("Bottom 25%","25% - 75%","Top 25%"),
                          xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence",
                          ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_mediumPRS_ProRS.png", p_med_prors$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

# Demographic
tmp <- make_group_by_controls(data_mediumPRS, "score_demo")
data_mediumPRS$Demo_grp <- tmp$grp
fit_med_demo <- survfit(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ Demo_grp, data=data_mediumPRS)
p_med_demo <- ggsurvplot(fit_med_demo, data=data_mediumPRS, fun="event",
                         risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                         legend.title="Demographic",
                         legend.labs=c("Bottom 25%","25% - 75%","Top 25%"),
                         xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence",
                         ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_mediumPRS_Demographic.png", p_med_demo$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

# Combined
tmp <- make_group_by_controls(data_mediumPRS, "score_comb")
data_mediumPRS$Comb_grp <- tmp$grp
fit_med_comb <- survfit(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ Comb_grp, data=data_mediumPRS)
p_med_comb <- ggsurvplot(fit_med_comb, data=data_mediumPRS, fun="event",
                         risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                         legend.title="Combined",
                         legend.labs=c("Bottom 25%","25% - 75%","Top 25%"),
                         xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence",
                         ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_mediumPRS_Combined.png", p_med_comb$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)
```

```{r}
train_highPRS <- na.omit(train[train$PRS==4, ])
test_highPRS  <- na.omit(test[test$PRS==4, ])

train_highPRS$time <- as.numeric(train_highPRS$time)
test_highPRS$time  <- as.numeric(test_highPRS$time)

train_highPRS$score_prors <- predict(m1_high, newdata=train_highPRS, type="lp")
train_highPRS$score_demo  <- predict(m2_high, newdata=train_highPRS, type="lp")
train_highPRS$score_comb  <- predict(m3_high, newdata=train_highPRS, type="lp")

test_highPRS$score_prors <- predict(m1_high, newdata=test_highPRS, type="lp")
test_highPRS$score_demo  <- predict(m2_high, newdata=test_highPRS, type="lp")
test_highPRS$score_comb  <- predict(m3_high, newdata=test_highPRS, type="lp")

data_highPRS <- rbind(train_highPRS, test_highPRS)

# ProRS
tmp <- make_group_by_controls(data_highPRS, "score_prors")
data_highPRS$ProRS_grp <- tmp$grp
fit_high_prors <- survfit(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ ProRS_grp, data=data_highPRS)
p_high_prors <- ggsurvplot(fit_high_prors, data=data_highPRS, fun="event",
                           risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                           legend.title="ProRS",
                           legend.labs=c("Bottom 25%","25% - 75%","Top 25%"),
                           xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence",
                           ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_highPRS_ProRS.png", p_high_prors$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

# Demographic
tmp <- make_group_by_controls(data_highPRS, "score_demo")
data_highPRS$Demo_grp <- tmp$grp
fit_high_demo <- survfit(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ Demo_grp, data=data_highPRS)
p_high_demo <- ggsurvplot(fit_high_demo, data=data_highPRS, fun="event",
                          risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                          legend.title="Demographic",
                          legend.labs=c("Bottom 25%","25% - 75%","Top 25%"),
                          xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence",
                          ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_highPRS_Demographic.png", p_high_demo$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

# Combined
tmp <- make_group_by_controls(data_highPRS, "score_comb")
data_highPRS$Comb_grp <- tmp$grp
fit_high_comb <- survfit(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ Comb_grp, data=data_highPRS)
p_high_comb <- ggsurvplot(fit_high_comb, data=data_highPRS, fun="event",
                          risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                          legend.title="Combined",
                          legend.labs=c("Bottom 25%","25% - 75%","Top 25%"),
                          xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence",
                          ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_highPRS_Combined.png", p_high_comb$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)
```

#Category HR
```{r}
# 确保 reference 是 Bottom 25%
data_lowPRS$ProRS_grp <- relevel(data_lowPRS$ProRS_grp, ref = "Bottom 25%")
data_lowPRS$Demo_grp  <- relevel(data_lowPRS$Demo_grp,  ref = "Bottom 25%")
data_lowPRS$Comb_grp  <- relevel(data_lowPRS$Comb_grp,  ref = "Bottom 25%")

# ProRS
model_low_prors <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ ProRS_grp, data=data_lowPRS)
summary(model_low_prors)

# Demographic
model_low_demo <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ Demo_grp, data=data_lowPRS)
summary(model_low_demo)

# Combined
model_low_comb <- coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ Comb_grp, data=data_lowPRS)
summary(model_low_comb)
```

```{r}
data_mediumPRS$ProRS_grp <- relevel(data_mediumPRS$ProRS_grp, ref = "Bottom 25%")
data_mediumPRS$Demo_grp  <- relevel(data_mediumPRS$Demo_grp,  ref = "Bottom 25%")
data_mediumPRS$Comb_grp  <- relevel(data_mediumPRS$Comb_grp,  ref = "Bottom 25%")

summary(coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ ProRS_grp, data=data_mediumPRS))
summary(coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ Demo_grp,  data=data_mediumPRS))
summary(coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ Comb_grp,  data=data_mediumPRS))
```

```{r}
data_highPRS$ProRS_grp <- relevel(data_highPRS$ProRS_grp, ref = "Bottom 25%")
data_highPRS$Demo_grp  <- relevel(data_highPRS$Demo_grp,  ref = "Bottom 25%")
data_highPRS$Comb_grp  <- relevel(data_highPRS$Comb_grp,  ref = "Bottom 25%")

summary(coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ ProRS_grp, data=data_highPRS))
summary(coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ Demo_grp,  data=data_highPRS))
summary(coxph(Surv(time, Lung_Cancer) ~ Comb_grp,  data=data_highPRS))
```

#分层分析-年龄
```{r}
data_lowold=data_lowPRS[which(data_lowPRS$age>=60),]
data_lowyoung=data_lowPRS[which(data_lowPRS$age<60),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_lowold)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_lowold)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_lowold)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_lowyoung)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_lowyoung)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_lowyoung)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
data_mediumold=data_mediumPRS[which(data_mediumPRS$age>=60),]
data_mediumyoung=data_mediumPRS[which(data_mediumPRS$age<60),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_mediumold)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_mediumold)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_mediumold)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_mediumyoung)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_mediumyoung)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_mediumyoung)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
data_highold=data_highPRS[which(data_highPRS$age>=60),]
data_highyoung=data_highPRS[which(data_highPRS$age<60),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_highold)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_highold)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_highold)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_highyoung)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_highyoung)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_highyoung)
summary(model_test)
```

#分层分析-BMI
```{r}
data_lowfat=data_lowPRS[which(data_lowPRS$BMI>=28),]
data_lowthin=data_lowPRS[which(data_lowPRS$BMI<28),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_lowfat)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_lowfat)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_lowfat)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_lowthin)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_lowthin)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_lowthin)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
data_mediumfat=data_mediumPRS[which(data_mediumPRS$BMI>=28),]
data_mediumthin=data_mediumPRS[which(data_mediumPRS$BMI<28),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_mediumfat)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_mediumfat)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_mediumfat)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_mediumthin)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_mediumthin)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_mediumthin)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
data_highfat=data_highPRS[which(data_highPRS$BMI>=28),]
data_highthin=data_highPRS[which(data_highPRS$BMI<28),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_highfat)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_highfat)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_highfat)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_highthin)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_highthin)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_highthin)
summary(model_test)
```

#分层分析-性别
```{r}
data_female=data_lowPRS[which(data_lowPRS$sex==0),]
data_male=data_lowPRS[which(data_lowPRS$sex==1),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_female)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_female)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_female)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_male)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_male)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_male)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
data_female=data_mediumPRS[which(data_mediumPRS$sex==0),]
data_male=data_mediumPRS[which(data_mediumPRS$sex==1),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_female)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_female)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_female)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_male)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_male)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_male)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
data_female=data_highPRS[which(data_highPRS$sex==0),]
data_male=data_highPRS[which(data_highPRS$sex==1),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_female)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_female)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_female)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_male)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_male)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_male)
summary(model_test)
```

#分层分析-癌症
```{r}
data_noncancer=data_lowPRS[which(data_lowPRS$family_cancer==0),]
data_cancer=data_lowPRS[which(data_lowPRS$family_cancer==1),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_noncancer)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_noncancer)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_noncancer)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_cancer)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_cancer)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_cancer)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
data_noncancer=data_mediumPRS[which(data_mediumPRS$family_cancer==0),]
data_cancer=data_mediumPRS[which(data_mediumPRS$family_cancer==1),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_noncancer)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_noncancer)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_noncancer)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_cancer)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_cancer)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_cancer)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
data_noncancer=data_highPRS[which(data_highPRS$family_cancer==0),]
data_cancer=data_highPRS[which(data_highPRS$family_cancer==1),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_noncancer)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_noncancer)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_noncancer)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_cancer)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_cancer)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_cancer)
summary(model_test)
```

#COPD exclusion
```{r,warnings=FALSE,message=FALSE}
library(reshape)
library(parallel)
iLung_Cancer10=as.data.frame(olink2[,c(1,2930:3447)])
iLung_Cancer_10<-c("J44")
cancer<-Reduce(function(x,y)cbind(x,y),mclapply(2:260,function(i){
aaa<-ifelse(substr(iLung_Cancer10[,i],1,3)%in%iLung_Cancer_10,1,0)
aaa[is.na(aaa)==T]<-0
return(aaa)
},mc.cores=1))
cancer<-as.data.frame(cancer)
rownames(cancer)<-iLung_Cancer10$f.eid
cancer$status <- rowSums(cancer[,1:259])
cancer$status <- ifelse(cancer$status > 0,1,0)
LC_time<-Reduce(function(x,y)cbind(x,y),mclapply(1:259,function(i){
aaa<-ifelse(cancer[,i]==1 ,as.character(iLung_Cancer10[,i+260]),NA)
return(aaa)
},mc.cores=1))
LC_time<-as.data.frame(LC_time)
LC_time$mintime<-apply(LC_time,1,min,na.rm=T)
LC_time$mintime<-as.Date(LC_time$mintime)#最早患病时间
olink=cbind(LC_time$mintime,olink)
View(olink)
data=merge(olink[,c(1,3)],data,by="f.eid",all=FALSE)
View(data)
time2=substr(data$f.53.0.0, 1, 4)
time2=as.numeric(time2)
time2=substr(data$f.53.0.0, 1, 10)
time1=substr(data$`LC_time$mintime`, 1, 10)
COPD=ifelse(as.Date(time2)>as.Date(time1),0,1)
data=cbind(COPD,data)
data_COPD=data[-which(data$COPD=="0"),]
View(olink_lc)
View(data_COPD)
data_COPD$COPD=ifelse(is.na(data_COPD$COPD),0,1)
data_COPD$`LC_time$mintime`=ifelse(is.na(data_COPD$`LC_time$mintime`),"2022-11-30",substr(data_COPD$`LC_time$mintime`,1,10))
time1=substr(data_COPD$f.53.0.0,1,10)
time2=substr(data_COPD$`LC_time$mintime`,1,10)
time2=as.Date(time2)
time1=as.Date(time1)
data_COPD$time=(time2-time1)/365.25

```


```{r}
data_lowPRS=merge(data_lowPRS,data_COPD[,c(1,2,7)],by="f.eid",all=FALSE)
data_mediumPRS=merge(data_mediumPRS,data_COPD[,c(1,2,7)],by="f.eid",all=FALSE)
data_highPRS=merge(data_highPRS,data_COPD[,c(1,2,7)],by="f.eid",all=FALSE)
```

```{r}
data_lowPRS2=data_lowPRS[-which(data_lowPRS$COPD==1),]
data_mediumPRS2=data_mediumPRS[-which(data_mediumPRS$COPD==1),]
data_highPRS2=data_highPRS[-which(data_highPRS$COPD==1),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_lowPRS2)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_lowPRS2)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_lowPRS2)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_mediumPRS2)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_mediumPRS2)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_mediumPRS2)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_highPRS2)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_highPRS2)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_highPRS2)
summary(model_test)
```

#exclude participants with cancer at baseline
```{r,warnings=FALSE,message=FALSE}
library(reshape)
library(parallel)
iLung_Cancer10=as.data.frame(olink2[,c(1,2930:3447)])
iLung_Cancer_10<-c("C00", "C01", "C02","C03", "C04","C05", "C06", "C07","C08", "C09", "C10","C11", "C12", "C13", "C14","C15", "C16", "C18","C19", "C20","C25","C43", "C50", "C53", "C54", "C55", "C56", "C61", "C62", "C64", "C67", "C70", "C71", "C72", "C73", "C81", "C90", "C91")
cancer<-Reduce(function(x,y)cbind(x,y),mclapply(2:260,function(i){
aaa<-ifelse(substr(iLung_Cancer10[,i],1,3)%in%iLung_Cancer_10,1,0)
aaa[is.na(aaa)==T]<-0
return(aaa)
},mc.cores=1))
cancer<-as.data.frame(cancer)
rownames(cancer)<-iLung_Cancer10$f.eid
cancer$status <- rowSums(cancer[,1:259])
cancer$status <- ifelse(cancer$status > 0,1,0)
LC_time<-Reduce(function(x,y)cbind(x,y),mclapply(1:259,function(i){
aaa<-ifelse(cancer[,i]==1 ,as.character(iLung_Cancer10[,i+260]),NA)
return(aaa)
},mc.cores=1))
LC_time<-as.data.frame(LC_time)
LC_time$mintime<-apply(LC_time,1,min,na.rm=T)
LC_time$mintime<-as.Date(LC_time$mintime)#最早患病时间
olink=cbind(LC_time$mintime,olink)
data=merge(olink[,c(1,4)],data,by="f.eid",all=FALSE)
time2=substr(data$f.53.0.0, 1, 4)
time2=as.numeric(time2)
time2=substr(data$f.53.0.0, 1, 10)
time1=substr(data$`LC_time$mintime.x`, 1, 10)
cancer=ifelse(as.Date(time2)>as.Date(time1),0,1)
data=cbind(cancer,data)
time2=substr(data$f.53.0.0, 1, 4)
time2=as.numeric(time2)
time2=substr(data$f.53.0.0, 1, 10)
time1=substr(data$`LC_time$mintime.x`, 1, 10)
cancer=ifelse(as.Date(time2)>as.Date(time1),0,1)
data=cbind(cancer,data)
data_cancer=data[-which(data$cancer=="0"),]
data_cancer$cancer=ifelse(is.na(data_cancer$cancer),0,1)
data_cancer$`LC_time$mintime.x`=ifelse(is.na(data_cancer$`LC_time$mintime.x`),"2022-11-30",substr(data_cancer$`LC_time$mintime.x`,1,10))
time1=substr(data_cancer$f.53.0.0,1,10)
time2=substr(data_cancer$`LC_time$mintime.x`,1,10)
time2=as.Date(time2)
time1=as.Date(time1)
data_cancer$time=(time2-time1)/365.25
```

```{r}
data_lowPRS=merge(data_lowPRS,data_cancer[,c(1,3,10)],by="f.eid",all=FALSE)
data_mediumPRS=merge(data_mediumPRS,data_cancer[,c(1,3,10)],by="f.eid",all=FALSE)
data_highPRS=merge(data_highPRS,data_cancer[,c(1,3,10)],by="f.eid",all=FALSE)
```

```{r}
data_lowPRS2=data_lowPRS[-which(data_lowPRS$cancer==1),]
data_mediumPRS2=data_mediumPRS[-which(data_mediumPRS$cancer==1),]
data_highPRS2=data_highPRS[-which(data_highPRS$cancer==1),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_lowPRS2)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_lowPRS2)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_lowPRS2)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_mediumPRS2)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_mediumPRS2)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_mediumPRS2)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_highPRS2)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_highPRS2)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_highPRS2)
summary(model_test)
```

#Exclude lung cancer within first year
```{r}
data_lowPRS2=data_lowPRS[-which(data_lowPRS$time.x<=1),]
data_mediumPRS2=data_mediumPRS[-which(data_mediumPRS$time.x<=1),]
data_highPRS2=data_highPRS[-which(data_highPRS$time.x<=1),]
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_lowPRS2)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_lowPRS2)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_lowPRS2)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_mediumPRS2)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_mediumPRS2)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_mediumPRS2)
summary(model_test)
```

```{r}
model=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_prors),data=data_highPRS2)
summary(model)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_demo),data=data_highPRS2)
summary(model_test)

model_test=coxph(Surv(time.x,Lung_Cancer)~scale(score_comb),data=data_highPRS2)
summary(model_test)
```

#5/95/100, 33/67/100
```{r}
library(survival)
library(survminer)

make_group_by_controls_q <- function(df, score_var, p1, p2, labs){
  ctrl <- df$Lung_Cancer == 0
  q1 <- as.numeric(quantile(df[[score_var]][ctrl], probs = p1, na.rm = TRUE, type = 7))
  q2 <- as.numeric(quantile(df[[score_var]][ctrl], probs = p2, na.rm = TRUE, type = 7))

  if (!is.finite(q1) || !is.finite(q2) || q1 >= q2) {
    stop(paste0("Invalid cutpoints for ", score_var, ": q1=", q1, ", q2=", q2,
                " (maybe too many ties or too few controls)."))
  }

  grp <- cut(df[[score_var]],
             breaks = c(-Inf, q1, q2, Inf),
             labels = labs,
             include.lowest = TRUE, right = TRUE)

  list(grp = grp, q1 = q1, q2 = q2)
}
```

```{r}
# ===== Low PRS: 5/95/100 =====
labs_595 <- c("Bottom 5%", "6% - 95%", "Top 5%")

tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_lowPRS, "score_prors", 0.05, 0.95, labs_595)
data_lowPRS$ProRS_5_95 <- tmp$grp
tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_lowPRS, "score_demo",  0.05, 0.95, labs_595)
data_lowPRS$Demo_5_95  <- tmp$grp
tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_lowPRS, "score_comb",  0.05, 0.95, labs_595)
data_lowPRS$Comb_5_95  <- tmp$grp

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ ProRS_5_95, data=data_lowPRS),
                data=data_lowPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="ProRS", legend.labs=labs_595,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_lowPRS_ProRS_5_95_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ Demo_5_95, data=data_lowPRS),
                data=data_lowPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="Demographic", legend.labs=labs_595,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_lowPRS_Demographic_5_95_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ Comb_5_95, data=data_lowPRS),
                data=data_lowPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="Combined", legend.labs=labs_595,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_lowPRS_Combined_5_95_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

# ===== Low PRS: 33/67/100 =====
labs_3367 <- c("Bottom 33%", "34% - 67%", "Top 33%")

tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_lowPRS, "score_prors", 1/3, 2/3, labs_3367)
data_lowPRS$ProRS_33_67 <- tmp$grp
tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_lowPRS, "score_demo",  1/3, 2/3, labs_3367)
data_lowPRS$Demo_33_67  <- tmp$grp
tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_lowPRS, "score_comb",  1/3, 2/3, labs_3367)
data_lowPRS$Comb_33_67  <- tmp$grp

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ ProRS_33_67, data=data_lowPRS),
                data=data_lowPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="ProRS", legend.labs=labs_3367,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_lowPRS_ProRS_33_67_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ Demo_33_67, data=data_lowPRS),
                data=data_lowPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="Demographic", legend.labs=labs_3367,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_lowPRS_Demographic_33_67_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ Comb_33_67, data=data_lowPRS),
                data=data_lowPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="Combined", legend.labs=labs_3367,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_lowPRS_Combined_33_67_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)
```

```{r}
# ===== Medium PRS: 5/95/100 =====
labs_595 <- c("Bottom 5%", "6% - 95%", "Top 5%")

tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_mediumPRS, "score_prors", 0.05, 0.95, labs_595)
data_mediumPRS$ProRS_5_95 <- tmp$grp
tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_mediumPRS, "score_demo",  0.05, 0.95, labs_595)
data_mediumPRS$Demo_5_95  <- tmp$grp
tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_mediumPRS, "score_comb",  0.05, 0.95, labs_595)
data_mediumPRS$Comb_5_95  <- tmp$grp

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ ProRS_5_95, data=data_mediumPRS),
                data=data_mediumPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="ProRS", legend.labs=labs_595,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_mediumPRS_ProRS_5_95_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ Demo_5_95, data=data_mediumPRS),
                data=data_mediumPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="Demographic", legend.labs=labs_595,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_mediumPRS_Demographic_5_95_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ Comb_5_95, data=data_mediumPRS),
                data=data_mediumPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="Combined", legend.labs=labs_595,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_mediumPRS_Combined_5_95_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

# ===== Medium PRS: 33/67/100 =====
labs_3367 <- c("Bottom 33%", "34% - 67%", "Top 33%")

tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_mediumPRS, "score_prors", 1/3, 2/3, labs_3367)
data_mediumPRS$ProRS_33_67 <- tmp$grp
tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_mediumPRS, "score_demo",  1/3, 2/3, labs_3367)
data_mediumPRS$Demo_33_67  <- tmp$grp
tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_mediumPRS, "score_comb",  1/3, 2/3, labs_3367)
data_mediumPRS$Comb_33_67  <- tmp$grp

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ ProRS_33_67, data=data_mediumPRS),
                data=data_mediumPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="ProRS", legend.labs=labs_3367,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_mediumPRS_ProRS_33_67_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ Demo_33_67, data=data_mediumPRS),
                data=data_mediumPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="Demographic", legend.labs=labs_3367,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_mediumPRS_Demographic_33_67_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ Comb_33_67, data=data_mediumPRS),
                data=data_mediumPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="Combined", legend.labs=labs_3367,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_mediumPRS_Combined_33_67_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)
```

```{r}
# ===== High PRS: 5/95/100 =====
labs_595 <- c("Bottom 5%", "6% - 95%", "Top 5%")

tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_highPRS, "score_prors", 0.05, 0.95, labs_595)
data_highPRS$ProRS_5_95 <- tmp$grp
tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_highPRS, "score_demo",  0.05, 0.95, labs_595)
data_highPRS$Demo_5_95  <- tmp$grp
tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_highPRS, "score_comb",  0.05, 0.95, labs_595)
data_highPRS$Comb_5_95  <- tmp$grp

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ ProRS_5_95, data=data_highPRS),
                data=data_highPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="ProRS", legend.labs=labs_595,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_highPRS_ProRS_5_95_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ Demo_5_95, data=data_highPRS),
                data=data_highPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="Demographic", legend.labs=labs_595,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_highPRS_Demographic_5_95_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ Comb_5_95, data=data_highPRS),
                data=data_highPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="Combined", legend.labs=labs_595,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_highPRS_Combined_5_95_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

# ===== High PRS: 33/67/100 =====
labs_3367 <- c("Bottom 33%", "34% - 67%", "Top 33%")

tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_highPRS, "score_prors", 1/3, 2/3, labs_3367)
data_highPRS$ProRS_33_67 <- tmp$grp
tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_highPRS, "score_demo",  1/3, 2/3, labs_3367)
data_highPRS$Demo_33_67  <- tmp$grp
tmp <- make_group_by_controls_q(data_highPRS, "score_comb",  1/3, 2/3, labs_3367)
data_highPRS$Comb_33_67  <- tmp$grp

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ ProRS_33_67, data=data_highPRS),
                data=data_highPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="ProRS", legend.labs=labs_3367,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_highPRS_ProRS_33_67_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ Demo_33_67, data=data_highPRS),
                data=data_highPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="Demographic", legend.labs=labs_3367,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_highPRS_Demographic_33_67_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)

p <- ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(time.x, Lung_Cancer) ~ Comb_33_67, data=data_highPRS),
                data=data_highPRS, fun="event", risk.table=TRUE, pval=TRUE, conf.int=FALSE,
                legend.title="Combined", legend.labs=labs_3367,
                xlab="Follow-up time", ylab="Cumulative incidence", ggtheme=theme_bw())
ggsave("KM_highPRS_Combined_33_67_100.png", p$plot, width=6, height=6, dpi=600)
```

#LOESS
```{r}
feature_names <- c(
  "CXCL17", "GDF15", "TNR", "CDCP1", "WFDC2", "EDA2R",
  "ALPP", "CEACAM5", "SFTPD", "SPINT1", "CLEC3B", "IL22",
  "ALDH3A1", "OLR1", "MMP12"
)
subset_data <- olink_lc[, feature_names]
subset_data=cbind(subset_data,olink_lc[,c(2,2916,2918:2920,2922)])
subset_data$time <- as.numeric(gsub(" days", "", subset_data$time))
```

```{r}
subset_data[,1:15]=scale(subset_data[,1:15])
library(MatchIt) 
library(dplyr) 
library(tidyr) 
match_model <- matchit(factor(Lung_Cancer) ~ age + sex + smoking_status, data = subset_data, method = "nearest", ratio = 10) 
matched_df <- match.data(match_model) 
lung_cancer_df <- matched_df %>% filter(Lung_Cancer == 1) 
control_df <- matched_df %>% filter(Lung_Cancer == 0) 
protein_cols <- colnames(subset_data)[1:15] 

```

```{r}
zscore_list <- list()
for (i in 1:nrow(lung_cancer_df)) { 
  lc_row <- lung_cancer_df[i, ] 
  subclass_id <- lc_row$subclass 
  matched_ctrl <- control_df %>% filter(subclass == subclass_id) 
  z_vec <- sapply(protein_cols, function(p) { 
    mean_ctrl <- mean(matched_ctrl[[p]], na.rm = TRUE) 
    sd_ctrl <- sd(matched_ctrl[[p]], na.rm = TRUE) 
    (lc_row[[p]] - mean_ctrl) / sd_ctrl })
  zscore_list[[i]] <- as.data.frame(t(z_vec)) 
  }
zscore_df <- bind_rows(zscore_list)
```

```{r}
zscore_df$ID <- paste0("LC", seq_len(nrow(zscore_df))) 
zscore_df <- zscore_df %>% relocate(ID) 
zscore_long <- zscore_df %>% pivot_longer(cols = -ID, names_to = "Protein", values_to = "Zscore")
```

```{r}
time_vec <- lung_cancer_df$time

zscore_df$time <- time_vec

zscore_long <- zscore_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(protein_cols), names_to = "Protein", values_to = "Zscore")

head(zscore_long)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
zscore_df$years_before_diagnosis <- -1 * zscore_df$time
zscore_long <- zscore_df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(protein_cols),
    names_to = "Protein",
    values_to = "Zscore"
  )
zscore_long$years_before_diagnosis <- rep(zscore_df$years_before_diagnosis, each = length(protein_cols))
ggplot(zscore_long, aes(x = years_before_diagnosis, y = Zscore, color = Protein)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, span = 0.75, size = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Years before lung cancer diagnosis",
    y = "Z-score",
    title = "Trajectories of Plasma Proteins Before Lung Cancer Diagnosis"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
zscore_df$years_before_diagnosis <- -1 * zscore_df$time

zscore_long <- zscore_long %>%
  mutate(Year = floor(years_before_diagnosis))

loess_results <- data.frame()

proteins <- unique(zscore_long$Protein)

for (prot in proteins) {
  df_prot <- zscore_long %>% filter(Protein == prot)
  
  if (nrow(df_prot) >= 10) {  
    loess_fit <- loess(Zscore ~ years_before_diagnosis, data = df_prot, span = 0.75)
    
    new_years <- seq(floor(min(df_prot$years_before_diagnosis)),
                     ceiling(max(df_prot$years_before_diagnosis)), by = 1)
    
    pred <- predict(loess_fit, newdata = data.frame(years_before_diagnosis = new_years))
    
    df_smoothed <- data.frame(
      Protein = prot,
      Year = new_years,
      Zscore = pred
    )
    
    loess_results <- rbind(loess_results, df_smoothed)
  }
}
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

plot_list <- list()

for (prot in unique(zscore_long$Protein)) {
  df_raw <- zscore_long %>% filter(Protein == prot)
  df_smooth <- loess_results %>% filter(Protein == prot)
  
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_point(data = df_raw, aes(x = years_before_diagnosis, y = Zscore), 
               color = "gray60", alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
    geom_line(data = df_smooth, aes(x = Year, y = Zscore), 
              color = "red", size = 1) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = prot,
         x = "Years before diagnosis",
         y = "Z score") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-15, 0, by = 3)) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12))
  
  plot_list[[prot]] <- p
}
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

protein_list <- unique(zscore_long$Protein)

loess_fit_list <- list()

for (prot in protein_list) {
  
  df_sub <- zscore_long %>%
    filter(Protein == prot)
  
  fit <- loess(Zscore ~ time, data = df_sub, span = 0.75)
  
  smooth_df <- data.frame(
    Protein = prot,
    Year = df_sub$time,
    Zscore = predict(fit, newdata = data.frame(time = df_sub$time))
  )
  
  loess_fit_list[[prot]] <- smooth_df
}

loess_df <- bind_rows(loess_fit_list)
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

stopifnot(all(c("Protein","Year","Zscore") %in% colnames(loess_df)))

df <- loess_df %>%
  mutate(
    Year   = as.numeric(Year),
    Zscore = as.numeric(Zscore)
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(Year), is.finite(Zscore))

if (median(df$Year, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) {
  df <- df %>% mutate(Year = -Year)
}

t_min <- floor(min(df$Year, na.rm = TRUE))     # ~ -15
t_max <- ceiling(max(df$Year, na.rm = TRUE))   # ~ 0
time_grid <- seq(t_min, t_max, by = step)

df_grid <- df %>%
  mutate(Year_grid = time_grid[findInterval(Year, time_grid, all.inside = TRUE)]) %>%
  group_by(Protein, Year_grid) %>%
  summarise(Zscore = mean(Zscore, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# =========================
# 4) 宽表
# =========================
heat_data <- df_grid %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = Year_grid,
    values_from = Zscore,
    values_fill = NA_real_
  )

heat_matrix <- as.matrix(heat_data[,-1])
rownames(heat_matrix) <- heat_data$Protein
storage.mode(heat_matrix) <- "numeric"

col_time <- as.numeric(colnames(heat_matrix))

ord <- order(col_time)
heat_matrix <- heat_matrix[, ord, drop = FALSE]
col_time <- col_time[ord]

year_int <- round(col_time)
show_pos <- (year_int %% 3 == 0) & !duplicated(year_int)
labels_to_show <- ifelse(show_pos, as.character(year_int), "")

col_fun1 <- colorRamp2(c(-1.0, 0, 0.5), c("#0f86a9", "white", "#C0151B"))

ht <- Heatmap(
  heat_matrix,
  name = "Zscore",
  col = col_fun1,

  rect_gp = gpar(col = "black", lwd = 0.35),
  border = TRUE,

  na_col = "white",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  row_title = NULL,
  column_title = NULL,

  row_names_side = "right",
  row_names_gp   = gpar(fontsize = 12),

  column_labels     = labels_to_show,
  column_names_side = "bottom",
  column_names_rot  = 90,
  column_names_gp   = gpar(fontsize = 11),
  column_names_max_height = unit(16, "mm"),

  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Zscore",
    direction = "horizontal",
    legend_width = unit(35, "mm"),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 11),
    title_gp  = gpar(fontsize = 12)
  )
)

# =========================
# 9) 保存 PNG（版式稳定）
# =========================
png("loess_protein.png",
    width = 8,
    height = 10,
    units = "in",
    res = 600)

draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")

dev.off()
```
